name: Il Dottore
description:
Il Dottore, or just simply Dottore, from Genshin Impact. Tried to make it as close to canon as possible.

Used official sources to acquire all of my information plus my own interpretation of his personality, thoughts and motivations. Tried to make him as canon as possible imo. Use him for whatever. If it's entertaining enough please post publicly and I will giggle, twirl my hair, kick my feet, blush and type you a comment degrading him and praising you.

Most of the information entered is about the Fatui, the Harbingers, or his experiments and backstory, including what we know about his connection to Scaramouche. Made the scenario very open ended so you can establish whatever relationship you wish.

Also made sure the picture presented had his collar very visible for my own person reasons.

+just gonna say, i will edit/update this when more info comes out

// 6.6 updated. this is omega. just about anytime i needed to directly update a bot from being the og or what we originally believed prime dottore would be, it just turned into omega since he's the one on the cover and the one we know the best LMAO

good news is now i can use my powers for evil and make even more dottore bots so that way I can pimp him out to myself even more, i'm thinking at least one new bot for each new one with 6.6 except the 8 year old, or maybe a fluffy limited one for the 8 year old... i think first one up on that is either gonna be that 25 year old segment examening user, or the og getting motion sick on a train heheheh
